question.label: Decision feedback
question.name: Substantive feedback on key decisions — what's missing from it right now?
question.description: Drills into the feedback gap Lin named to locate whether the issue is speed, quality, or decision alignment.

answer: I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.

assessment.note: Names missing ownership boundaries and default escalation, a strong clarity gap with a mild growth signal around limited decision scope.

new_queue.label: Ownership boundaries
new_queue.name: Ownership boundaries — where is default escalation happening most right now?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would actually be useful from me over the next two weeks?

new_queue.label: Next-two-weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked about, where do you want to focus first in the next two weeks?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 6)

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
